summary: App with invite code system: users can create a new family/project or join an existing one using invite codes stored in backend Map with one-time use logic
architectural_notes: Invite codes stored in HashMap with one-time use pattern (delete after use)
Startscreen separates create vs join flows before main app access
Backend exports invite functions: createInvite, useInvite, generateInviteCode
known_issues: Previous 'Actor not available' error caused by frontend calling non-existent backend methods

existing_features.title: Create welcome screen with app icon at top, centered layout similar to FamilyHub screenshot
Add 'Create a New Family' button (green/primary style) that makes the user the admin/owner and initializes a new family/team
Add 'Join Existing Family' button (gray/secondary style) that prompts user to enter an invite code
Add 'or' text divider between the two main action buttons on welcome screen
Add logout link at bottom of welcome screen for users who want to switch identities
Show welcome screen to authenticated users who have not yet joined or created a family/team

new_feature_requests.summary: Backend invite code API with Map storage and one-time use logic
Startscreen with options to create new family or join existing via invite code
Create backend invite code generation function that generates unique one-time use invite codes and stores them in a Map with associated team/family information
Create backend invite code validation function that checks if a code exists, returns the associated team information, and deletes the code after successful use
Export all invite-related backend actor methods to fix 'Actor not available' error
